anchor: Simvastatin is a substrate of CYP3A4.
notes: classic CYP3A4 substrate; label co-names inhibitors

anchor: Lovastatin is metabolized by CYP3A4; strong inhibitors of CYP3A4 can raise plasma levels.
notes: substrate; label uses generic 'strong inhibitors of CYP3A4'

anchor: Atorvastatin is a substrate of CYP3A4 and transporters.
notes: substrate; dose caps but no absolute contraindication

anchor: Pravastatin is not extensively metabolized by CYP3A4.
notes: NEGATIVE — non-CYP3A4 statin. Any CYP3A4 edge here = false positive.

anchor: Rosuvastatin is not an inhibitor or substrate of CYP3A4; minimal CYP metabolism.
notes: NEGATIVE — non-CYP3A4 statin. Any CYP3A4 edge here = false positive.

anchor: Concomitant administration of clarithromycin with statins extensively metabolized by CYP3A4 (lovastatin or simvastatin) is contraindicated.
notes: strong inhibitor (required); also a CYP3A4 substrate (optional)

anchor: Erythromycin is a CYP3A4 inhibitor; grouped with clarithromycin in statin labels.
notes: strong inhibitor; NOTE thin label (707 chars) — recall risk anchor

anchor: Itraconazole and its major metabolite are potent CYP3A4 inhibitors.
notes: strong inhibitor (required); also a CYP3A4 substrate (optional)

anchor: Ketoconazole is a potent inhibitor of CYP3A4.
notes: strong inhibitor; azole. NOTE own label lacks self-CYP3A4 sentence — recovered via substrate labels

anchor: Ritonavir is a potent CYP3A4 inhibitor.
notes: strong inhibitor; HIV PI. Named only as class 'HIV protease inhibitors' in statin labels — hard to recover by name.

anchor: Diltiazem is an inhibitor of CYP3A4; limit simvastatin to 10 mg.
notes: moderate inhibitor; CCB. Label states inhibitor but not graded strength.

anchor: Verapamil is a CYP3A4 inhibitor; limit simvastatin dose.
notes: moderate inhibitor; CCB. Also a CYP3A4 substrate (optional).

anchor: Lower starting dose of other CYP3A4 substrates may be required; do not exceed simvastatin 20 mg with amiodarone.
notes: moderate/weak on own label; grounded via substrate labels

anchor: Dronedarone is a moderate CYP3A4 inhibitor; limit simvastatin to 10 mg.
notes: moderate inhibitor. Own label lacks self-CYP3A4 sentence.

anchor: Avoid the use of rifampin, a strong CYP3A4 inducer, if possible; decreases statin exposure.
notes: strong inducer; DUR uses INN spelling Rifampicin

anchor: Carbamazepine is a strong inducer of CYP3A4 (and itself a CYP3A4 substrate).
notes: DUAL ROLE: inducer (required) + substrate (optional)

anchor: Phenytoin is a strong CYP3A4 inducer.
notes: strong inducer. Own label lacks self-CYP3A4 sentence.

anchor: Midazolam is a CYP3A4 substrate (sensitive index substrate).
notes: substrate; hard-negative pairing anchor. Own label lacks self-CYP3A4 sentence.

anchor: Fluconazole is a moderate CYP3A4 inhibitor.
notes: moderate inhibitor; azole. Label implies inhibition (contraindicates CYP3A4 substrates) but omits graded strength.

anchor: Nefazodone is a potent CYP3A4 inhibitor; simvastatin/lovastatin contraindicated.
notes: strong inhibitor. Self-text sits deep in label (needed cap raise).

anchor: Phenobarbital is a CYP3A4 inducer (barbiturate).
notes: strong inducer. Own label lacks self-CYP3A4 sentence.

anchor: Cyclosporine inhibits CYP3A4 (also a substrate).
notes: moderate inhibitor. NOTE thin label (1005 chars) — recall risk anchor
